identity.name: Maestro EGP
identity.description: A premium, high-efficiency POS and Cost Control system for the Iraqi hospitality sector.

structure.style: Fixed panel, high contrast, large totals
Glassmorphism, contains Branch Selector & User Profile

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 rounded-lg font-bold transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.pos_item: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card hover:border-primary/50 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group

cards.dashboard: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm p-6

inputs.default: h-12 bg-background border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-lg text-lg

media.icons: Use Lucide-React. For POS categories, use large stroke-width (1.5px) icons.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 for text. Use Gold text on Black bg, or Black text on Gold bg.
accessibility.sound: Implement 'use-sound' library for click feedback on POS items.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. RTL CONFIGURATION: You MUST add 'dir=rtl' to the root html tag or the main layout wrapper. Use Tailwind logical properties (ms-*, me-*, ps-*, pe-*) instead of left/right where possible.
2. FONT SETUP: Import 'Cairo' and 'Tajawal' from Google Fonts in index.css immediately.
3. THEME TOGGLE: Implement a robust ThemeProvider that supports 'system', 'dark', 'light'. Default to 'dark' for POS routes.
4. POS LAYOUT: The POS screen is the core. It must be full-screen, immersive, and disable standard browser scrolling if possible (app-like feel).
5. SOUND: Add a subtle 'click' sound effect to the POS item buttons. This is a requested feature.
6. CURRENCY: All prices must be formatted as 'IQD 15,000' or '15,000 د.ع'. Use a utility function for this.
7. MOCK DATA: Use the provided image URLs to create a realistic 'MenuSeeder' script or mock data file.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
